new_queue.label: Energy routine impact
new_queue.name: How does your daily routine impact your energy levels?
new_queue.description: Examines the effect of Lesley's routine on her energy and performance.

new_queue.label: Priority clarity
new_queue.name: What are you actually focused on this week, and why those things?
new_queue.description: Surfaces whether priorities are crisp or vague; whether they match what you thought.

new_queue.label: Support from manager
new_queue.name: What support would make the biggest difference for you right now?
new_queue.description: Identifies specific support needs from the manager.

new_queue.label: Growth opportunities
new_queue.name: What growth opportunities are you seeing for yourself right now?
new_queue.description: Explores Lesley's perception of her professional growth opportunities.
